name: terminal-gif-generator
description: Genera GIF animado del terminal SVG usando Puppeteer

scripts.generate: npm run capture && npm run encode
scripts.encode: ffmpeg -y -framerate 20 -pattern_type glob -i 'frames/frame_*.png' -filter_complex '[0:v] split [a][b]; [a] palettegen=stats_mode=full [p]; [b][p] paletteuse=dither=bayer' images/terminal.gif
